name.zh: 塔科夫环卫工 - 第一章

itemName.zh: MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 1 12铅径自动霰弹枪
itemName.en: MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 1 12ga automatic shotgun

description.zh:
你好啊，士兵，今天过得如何？
我有件有意思的事要告诉你，坐下来听听呗，我打赌你会感兴趣的……

最近，塔科夫这里从海外引入了一大批新武器，其中有一把叫做"AA-12"的霰弹枪，全自动，并且通常都配备圆盘弹匣。不过，我没有拿到太多这样的枪，所以也许你可以帮我一点忙。

比如你能不能带来三把？不用在战局中获取也行，非常感谢。
description.en:
Well hello there warrior, having a good day?
I got something interesting for you, take a seat, I'm sure you want to hear this...

So recently, we had a ton of new weapons come in from overseas here into Tarkov, one of those was a shotgun called the "AA-12", fully automatic and usually comes with drums. The thing is, I didn't get my hands on many of them, so maybe you can help me out a little bit here.

Are you able to bring me three pieces, they don't need to be picked up anywhere in raid, I'd be very grateful.
